catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Entire microsegment behavior deviates from history < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression:
Age IS NOT NULL
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > city

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS totalRecords,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed
FROM INTERNALQUERY;

education = 'High School'
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > city
AND date_of_joining < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)

SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT *,
         AVG(city) OVER (PARTITION BY townhall) AS avg_city_age
  FROM INTERNALQUERY
) t
WHERE city > avg_city_age;

SELECT
  townhall,
  COUNT(*) AS employee_count
FROM INTERNALQUERY
GROUP BY townhall
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY

Age IS NOT NULL
AND CAST(Age AS INT64) > city
SELECT DATE(date_of_joining) AS Date, COUNT(*) AS totalRecords, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalFailed FROM INTERNALQUERY GROUP BY DATE(date_of_joining)
SELECT CASE WHEN Age IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age_condition_flag FROM INTERNALQUERY

SELECT *
FROM INTERNALQUERY
WHERE city > 30 AND townhall = 'Christopherview'

SELECT *
FROM INTERNALQUERY
WHERE city > 30
  AND townhall = 'Christopherview';

SELECT
  townhall,
  COUNT(*) AS employee_count
FROM INTERNALQUERY
GROUP BY townhall;

catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Entire Dataset record count deviates from history < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT emp_id, CASE WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PASSED' END AS rule_status FROM INTERNALQUERY

SELECT
  emp_id,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(Age AS INT64) > city THEN 'FAILED'
    ELSE 'PASSED'
  END AS rule_status
FROM INTERNALQUERY;
